domain: Pangolin hexagonal overlapping keratin armor — each scale is centered on 6 neighbors; nano-scale suture interlocking; cracks propagate along inter-scale interfaces away from soft tissue.
specific_mechanism: 2D hexagonal tiled overlap pattern where each unit overlaps with 6 neighbors and damage to one unit is absorbed by adjacent units sharing the load.
llm_application: SCUTE-MEMORY: KV-cache organized as hexagonal-tiled shards. Each shard overlaps with 6 neighbors over a fraction f of the context. On retrieval, the union of 7 shards (center + 6 neighbors) provides robust coverage; eviction or corruption of any single shard does not lose information because adjacent shards retain overlap.
novelty_claim: RAG chunking with 10-20% overlap is 1D linear. Sliding-window attention is 1D. LMCache linear-partition KV. SCUTE-MEMORY's distinctive contribution is 2D HEXAGONAL TILING of the context with 6-neighbor union retrieval — a fundamentally 2D-redundancy partition rather than 1D edge-overlap.
